summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Golf Charity Subscription Platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with excellent responsive design. All key user flows tested successfully including landing page, navigation, signup/login, admin dashboard, user dashboard, charity directory, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API: Admin login (admin@golfcharity.com / admin123) - 200 OK
Backend API: User signup (testuser@example.com) - 200 OK
Backend API: GET /api/charities returns 5 seeded charities - 200 OK
Backend API: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns Monthly $9.99 and Yearly $99.99 - 200 OK
Backend API: GET /api/admin/analytics with admin token - 200 OK
Backend API: User profile retrieval - 200 OK
Backend API: Scores endpoint correctly blocks non-subscribers - 403 Forbidden
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section, stats bar, how it works, charity impact, prize pool sections
Frontend: Navigation bar with all required links (Home, Charities, Sign In, Subscribe)
Frontend: Charity directory at /charities shows 5 seeded charities with search and filter functionality
Frontend: User signup form at /signup with proper validation and error handling
Frontend: User login at /login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Admin login redirects to admin dashboard with all tabs (Analytics, Users, Charities, Draws, Winners)
Frontend: User dashboard with all tabs (Scores, Charity, Draws, Winnings, Settings)
Frontend: Subscription plans page shows Monthly $9.99 and Yearly $99.99 plans
Frontend: Admin dashboard charity creation form functional
Frontend: Admin dashboard draw creation form functional
Frontend: User dashboard score entry form (blocked without subscription)
Frontend: User dashboard charity selection form
Frontend: Mobile responsive design - navigation toggle works
Frontend: Mobile responsive layout for all key pages
